name: Mini Drift Car
short_description: Here, you will become a drifting superstar, challenging various tracks and enjoying the thrilling moments of turning. Very simple operation, but endless driving pleasure. You can also collect various cars and experience the unique handling of each one.
detailed_description:
This is a mini racing game, driving fun is no less than the big racing game, the operation is simple but endless changes, you just try it will be surprised.

This is a game to control the car drifting through the corner, simulate the real drifting.Higher levels of cars can be got by merge,that have better handling.A variety of different cool cars waiting for you to collect, 3000 different game tracks waiting for you to challenge one by one.

The game starts, the car will automatically advance.press the mouse and turn the car right,release the mouse and turn the car left.So easy.
The game has a large number of levels, the difficulty gradually increases.
The excitement and thrill of racing can be experienced in the game.
The game is simple and very decompress, so come and enjoy the immersive gaming experience.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Russian, Norwegian, Japanese, Polish, Swedish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Arabic, Korean, Ukrainian, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Indonesian, Turkish, Greek, Czech, Thai, Romanian, Finnish, Vietnamese
